name: io.github.lacausecrypto/mcp-belgium
title: mcp-belgium
description: Single MCP server for Belgian public transport, statistics, open data, and geospatial services.

environmentVariables.name: STIB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional STIB/MIVB API key to enable live Brussels public transport tools.

environmentVariables.name: CBEAPI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional CBEAPI key to enable live KBO/BCE Belgian company registry tools.
